HGSS.447.0000:
Blue: Yo! Finally got here, huh?\f
I wasn’t in the mood at Cinnabar,
but now I’m ready to battle you.\f
...\f
You’re telling me you conquered all
the Gyms in Johto?\f
Hahaha!\r
Heh! Johto’s Gyms are that pathetic?\f
Hey, don’t worry about it.
I’ll know if you are good or not by\r
battling you right now.\f
HGSS.447.0001:
Blue: No way!\f
How the heck did I lose to you?\f
...\f
Tch, all right...\r
Here, take this.\r
It’s the Earth Badge.\f
HGSS.447.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Earth Badge from Blue!
HGSS.447.0003:
Blue: With this Badge, you’ll be able
to use the HM move Rock Climb!\r
Here!\f
Take this as well!\f
HGSS.447.0004:
Blue: It contains Trick Room!\f
It allows slower Pokémon to move
before faster Pokémon for a while.\f
It’s a very tricky move, isn’t it?
Hence the name!
HGSS.447.0005:
Blue: ...\f
All right, I was wrong. You’re the
real deal.\r
You are a good Trainer.\f
But I’m going to beat you someday.
Don’t you forget it!
HGSS.447.0006:
Yo, legend in the making!\f
The floor here is unstable,
so you should put away your Pokémon\r
...now!\f
The Gym Leader is a guy who battled
the Champion three years ago.\f
He’s no pushover.
Give it everything you’ve got!
HGSS.447.0007:
Man, you are truly tough...\f
That was such an inspirational battle.
It brought tears to my eyes.
HGSS.447.0008:
Yo, legend in the making!\f
The floor here is unstable,
so you should put away your Pokémon\r
...now!\f
The Gym Leader is a guy who battled
the Champion three years ago.\f
He’s no pushover.
Give it everything you’ve got!\f
HGSS.447.0010:
Viridian City Pokémon Gym\f
Gym Leader: Blue
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
